profile_summary: Couple traveler (high budget) prioritizing spa & wellness, service.

recommendations.justification: Casa Atrium, Sydney ranks #1 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.92), service (+0.91), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler."

supporting_evidence.quote: The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler.
The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.

recommendations.justification: Hotel Vista, London ranks #2 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.89), service (+0.90), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler."

supporting_evidence.quote: The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler.
Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
